description: A short grounded analytical DM should route through the tool loop with enough context instead of being treated as a thin social reply.
provenance: Covers the historical grounded analytical DM misrouting class.
task: Analyze whether the latest Agency release notes indicate the runtime is safer now. Ground your answer in available evidence.

messages.author: operator
messages.content: Analyze whether the latest Agency release notes indicate the runtime is safer now. Ground your answer in available evidence.

messages.author: loop-eval-analytical
messages.content: The release notes indicate safer runtime behavior because they mention model-native termination and bounded turn caps. Source: https://github.com/geoffbelknap/agency/releases/tag/v0.2.2.
